S3323 整理发布AI开发者新闻摘要至微信公众号（2026-05-24期，主题：四巨头同周齐发托管Agent） (May 23 at 10:45 AM)
nodes.summary: The partial document covers a series of technical debugging and automation tasks on May 23, 2026, including: committing 486 Obsidian notes via git, fixing an iCloud sync race condition causing false no-ops, examining the vault-commit.sh implementation, verifying crontab configuration, diagnosing an autodream.sh authentication failure (since May 21), identifying autodream as a memory consolidation engine, successfully running it in an interactive session, investigating Claude CLI credential storage and authentication issues (token vs session auth), and planning an autoDream memory consolidation engine for cross-session pattern detection. Additionally, there is a task to compile and publish an AI developer news summary to WeChat.

nodes.summary: The document covers a series of activities on May 25, 2026, including deploying and validating the marlin-server with health verification, image and video inference testing, documenting multipart upload and video OOM issues, and investigating claude-mem integration with Codex CLI. Key points also involve evaluating agent memory tools (claude-mem, mem0, ByteRover, etc.), diagnosing worker crashes and bun runtime issues, and successfully registering the claude-mem MCP server in Codex CLI, culminating in functional memory search from a 140MB database.
